CustomField.description: Self-lookup linking this agreement to its Adjuto distributor code record. All related remuneration agreements (Rebates, IX, Platform, DEDS) must reference the same code.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The distributor code this agreement is linked to in Adjuto (e.g., L198_IT114). Use the same code for all related remunerations: Rebates, IX, Platform, DEDS.
CustomField.label: Adjuto Distributor Code
